name: 10" Lazy Susan Turn Table - Brightroom™: Non-Slip Kitchen Organizer, Spice & Pantry Storage, White Plastic
description:
Store small items on a countertop or in your cabinets while keeping them easily accessible with the help of this 10-Inch Turn Table from Brightroom™. With a 10-inch diameter and raised sides, this rotating round home storage solution helps you maximize space in cabinets and corners so you won't have to take everything out to access items in the back. Place it near your cooktop to store frequently used oils and seasonings, or add it to a bathroom cabinet for convenient rotating storage of toiletries and cosmetics.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
